message:
feat(freeze): Add private_in opcode Zig support

Convert private_in opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode checks if a private field exists (for #field in obj syntax).

Stack effect: [field_sym, obj] -> [bool] (pops 1, replaces with bool)

Implementation:
- Calls js_frozen_private_in with pointer to stack at sp-2
- This modifies the stack in-place, replacing field_sym and obj with bool
- Decrements sp by 1 (net pop of 1 value)
- Returns exception if check fails
- In Zig: uses @intCast for stack indexing
- In C: uses raw pointer arithmetic
